name: LATTICE SEMICONDUCTOR CORP
business: Lattice develops programmable logic semiconductor products, system solutions, design services, and technology licenses. It serves customers in the Communications and Computing, Industrial and Automotive, and Consumer markets. The company's products include FPGAs and related IP.

exposures.sentence: Lattice sensAI for Edge AI applications.
With the growth of hyperscale data centers, our processor agnostic solutions are ideal for dataplane, control, and connect functions in enterprise and data center server applications.
Lattice Automate for industrial automation and robotics.
Lattice Automate for industrial automation and robotics.
Lattice mVision for low power embedded vision.
Our low power, small form factor solutions are ideal for systems and sensor applications.
Lattice Sentry for implementing hardware security.
Lattice ORAN for robust control data security, flexible fronthaul synchronization, and low power hardware acceleration for secure, adaptable, ORAN deployment.
In humanoids, industrial robots, medical, Aerospace & Defense, and automotive applications.

In the Consumer Market, you can find our solutions making products smarter and smaller, including smart home devices, prosumer devices, sound bars, high end projectors, Augmented Reality ("AR") / Virtual Reality ("VR") devices, and wearables.
Lattice Drive for advanced, flexible automotive system designs and applications.
Lattice develops technologies that we monetize through differentiated programmable logic semiconductor products.
